subject: Validate: clawd-x3z Logout E2E Tests (90% pass)

acceptance_criteria: Logout E2E tests run without hanging
content.self_validation_notes: 9/10 tests pass (90%). All 3 viewports pass (desktop/tablet/mobile 3/3 each). 12 screenshots captured. E2E infrastructure fixed - was missing test user and had parallel conflicts. Edge case session verification test fails but doesn't impact core functionality.
